nodes.label: Maps the name of each weight if they match the following patterns.
Enable fused set_kv_buffer only on CUDA with bfloat16 KV cache.
Compute cu_seqlens from grid_thw using NumPy.      grid_thw: [T, 3] int tensor
Reshape a (..., H*D) tensor into (..., H, D) ahead of QK RMSNorm.      On CUDA
Apply QK normalization for query and key tensors.     If eligible, we will use
Fused QK GemmaRMSNorm — single Triton kernel for both q_norm and k_norm.
